question:
Why is self-awareness considered a critical component of emotional intelligence?
A) It allows you to perfectly predict the future.
B) Recognizing your own emotional triggers is the first step to managing your reactions and interacting fairly with others.
C) It means you never have to sleep.
D) It gives you the ability to read other people's minds precisely.
